headline: Microchip Technology Incorporated (MCHP) Capitalizes on Data Center and AI Boom
summary: Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) is one of the most buzzing AI semiconductor stocks to buy in 2026. On May 7, Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) delivered impressive fourth-quarter and fiscal 2026 results that asserted improved operating leverage and continued progress in balance sheet strength. The company also reiterated that it continues to see strong customer engagement […]

headline: AI Chips Today - Transforming Power: Microchip's Silicon Carbide Modules Revolutionize Efficiency
summary: The recent launch of Microchip Technology's 3.3 kV HV‑D3 mSiC® Power Modules marks a significant development in the AI chips landscape, particularly for AI hyperscale data centers. These new silicon carbide modules are designed to facilitate the adoption of solid-state transformers (SSTs), which offer improved power efficiency and reduced conversion stages, enhancing the delivery of power directly from the medium-voltage grid to server racks. The innovation addresses limitations traditionally...

headline: Microchip Technology Sees Demand Rebound, Margin Gains as Bookings Hit 4-Year High
summary: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) is seeing a broad-based recovery in demand and expects continued margin improvement as it ramps production and works down remaining underutilization costs, Chief Financial Officer Eric Bjornholt said at JPMorgan’s 54th Annual Technology and Media Communications Con
